textByHashes.6c0d77caf6a98c5086928530f3ac4a765382513f: Welcome to the Hefin Inn! What can I getcha?
textByHashes.829a20d84f8df034be6b709f027e8452e5c9bd8a: I can get you a Beer for 2 coins.
textByHashes.f09805f88ff38aa71b69c21ff60e10ebc8c4d157: I can get you a Cider for 2 coins.
textByHashes.2f2114d6cc412c0917fae4918ca01a875f222551: I can get you a Stew for 20 coins.
textByHashes.d788ef7548efd8f8edcf8241e309152f523fea4b: I can get you an Elven dawn for 6 coins.
